name: Celestial Magic

prerequisites.name: Angelkin, Lawbringer, Musetouched, or another lineage feat associated with celestials

description:
You possess celestial magic. Choose two of the following spells: , , , , , or . You can use each of the chosen spells once per day as 2nd-rank divine innate spells.

Angelkin typically take clear mind and humanoid form, lawbringers typically have everlight and share life, and musetouched typically have revealing light and sure footing.
